workbooks.title: Workbooks
workbooks.createDescription: Give your workbook a name. You can rename it later.
workbooks.createError: Failed to create workbook. Please try again.
workbooks.listDescription: View and manage your measurement notebooks.
workbooks.noCells: No cells yet. Open the workbook to start building your notebook.

messages.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
messages.deleteInUseConfirm_one: “{{name}}” is attached to {{count}} experiment. Deleting it will unlink that experiment, which will lose its measurement flow. This cannot be undone.
messages.deleteInUseConfirm_other: “{{name}}” is attached to {{count}} experiments. Deleting it will unlink those experiments, which will lose their measurement flow. This cannot be undone.

output.label: Output
output.empty: No measurement data available - run a protocol or command cell first
output.timeseriesError: Cannot decode this output against the source protocol

commandDynamic.tooltip: Dynamic commands take their value from an earlier cell at run time.
commandDynamic.readOnlyNote: This command reads its value from an earlier cell.
commandDynamic.questionNote: Uses the answer field (shared across all devices).

issue.sourceMissing: The referenced cell no longer exists. Pick an existing earlier cell.
issue.sourceIneligible: The referenced cell cannot supply a command value. Pick a protocol, command, macro, or question.
issue.sourceNotEarlier: The referenced cell must come before this command. Pick an earlier cell.
issue.fieldEmpty: Choose which output field supplies the command value.
issue.nodeUnreachable: This command is not reachable from the start of the flow. Connect it to the authored flow so it runs.
issue.graphAmbiguous: The reference is ambiguous across branch paths. Simplify the flow or pick a different source.
issue.invalidCarrier: This command cell cannot carry a dynamic reference.
issue.generic: This command reference needs attention before publishing.
